generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance TrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal path calculated for container movement"
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time validation results indicating trajectory deviations"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane operations and sensor data"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data available for analysis and reporting"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated crane behavior under various conditions for validation"
]

instance MessagingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data transmission via MQTT"
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlled by TMC4671-Eval controller for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlled by TMC4671-Eval controller for hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup and release"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal crane trajectories using kinematic models for efficient container movement",
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares simulated trajectories with actual crane movements in real-time for validation",
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of crane operations and sensor data using Grafana dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs time-series sensor data and crane operations into TimescaleDB for historical analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics to validate system behavior under various conditions",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT messaging service for real-time sensor data transmission",
    DTDFVocab:provides MessagingInsight
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying database, dashboard, and MQTT broker services",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane sensor data and operational logs",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization tool for real-time crane operation monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT messaging broker for real-time sensor data transmission",
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance GantrylibPythonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for controlling gantry crane hardware components",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontrollerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for interfacing sensors and actuators with the digital twin system",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Fusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for crane structure design"
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of crane structure created using Autodesk Fusion360",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360Enabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used for trajectory optimization and simulation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPythonEnabler
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane dynamics validation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPythonEnabler
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurements from crane hoist",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurements from anemometer",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance DatabaseContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB container for time-series data storage"
]

instance DashboardContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard container for data visualization"
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorServiceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Container for optimal trajectory generation service"
]

instance SimulationServiceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Container for crane dynamics simulation service"
]

instance ContinuousValidationServiceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Container for continuous validation service"
]

instance MQTTBrokerContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker container for messaging"
]

instance GantryCraneDigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin system composed of six interconnected containers",
    base:contains DatabaseContainer, DashboardContainer, TrajectoryGeneratorServiceContainer, SimulationServiceContainer, ContinuousValidationServiceContainer, MQTTBrokerContainer
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion using swing angle encoder",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed for environmental monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and Control Application are sent via MQTT to the Physical Crane Interface, which translates them into motor controller commands for movement and hoisting."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization for data logging and validation services with no specified temporal resolution."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integrated system where physical crane components (motors, sensors) interact with digital services via MQTT and database; digital services include Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, Dashboard, and Logging applications, all containerized and orchestrated through Docker compose."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the 'as operated' phase of the physical crane, with digital twin used during operational phase for continuous validation, trajectory optimization, and monitoring; CAD models represent the 'as designed' phase but the DT is primarily used for operational monitoring."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time measurements against simulated trajectories using distance metrics; thresholds determine validity; model validation techniques from [5] applied for verification of simulation accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto broker) for data exchange between physical crane interface and digital services; Python-based gantrylib module handles communication with hardware controllers."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on a single personal computer with Docker containerization for database (TimescaleDB), dashboard (Grafana), and MQTT broker (Eclipse Mosquitto); gantrylib Python module runs on the host OS."
]
